title: Vanilla Leftovers
description: Adds missing stairs, buttons, pressure plates and other block variants that Mojang seemingly forgot about.
body:
### **Vanilla Leftovers:**
Ever notice Mojang forgot some block variants? Vanilla Leftovers fills in the gaps. This mod adds missing stairs, slabs, buttons, pressure plates, and walls and other block variants that Mojang seemingly forgot about. This mod focuses on consistency across existing block families, filling in omissions where variants seemingly belong. It does not aim to add every possible variant, only those that feel appropriate within vanilla Minecraft.

### **Features include:**
- Smooth Stone Stairs
- Quartz Brick Stairs & Slabs
- Polished Deepslate Button & Pressure Plate
- Red Nether Brick Fence
- Stone, Polished Andesite, Diorite, Granite, Smooth Sandstone, Smooth Red Sandstone, Prismarine Brick, Dark Prismarine, Quartz Brick, and Purpur Walls
  
**_Craftable and available via the stonecutter._**
![Added Blocks Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c3d0185b858c19d6e14e858b311f738a4ca1301.jpeg)

**Modpack Friendly:**
Add it to any modpack you like. Credit is appreciated.

**Version ports?:**
I doubt it, Mojang tends to change things quite often internally and this mod was just created for fun, I will probably port to some versions eventually but for now this remains 1.21.10 only.

![Vanilla Leftovers Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aeb083c294e30897557b5ba4fd9e810167fc6afa.png)
